description:
You are preparing a demonstrative computer science and nutrition lesson. Create a Python script in the Sugar Pippy activity that processes a food macronutrient dataset located at /home/ga/Documents/nutrition.csv. The dataset contains values per 100 grams, which must be scaled for the following meal plan:
- Breakfast: 200g Whole Milk, 100g Banana, 100g Egg
- Lunch: 200g White Rice, 150g Black Beans, 50g Spinach
- Dinner: 150g Chicken Breast, 150g White Rice, 100g Apple

The script must calculate the total daily Calories, Protein, Carbs, and Fat, then output these labeled totals on separate lines to /home/ga/Documents/diet_report.txt. Save the script source code to /home/ga/Documents/nutrition_calculator.py. Use standard Python file I/O and CSV parsing without external libraries like Pandas. Finally, name the Pippy activity session 'Diet Calculator' and ensure it is saved to the Sugar Journal.
